title: Notify a Job Title in Automations rather than a specific person
excerpt: When notifying someone by automations the options are ‘Me’, "Team Member’, ‘People Column’, ‘Subscribers’, ‘Team’, and ‘Guest’, can we add ‘Job Title’? That way if we want to notify an Director when something happens and…

posts.author: Sofi (Sofia Peña)
posts.cookedHtml: When notifying someone by automations the options are ‘Me’, "Team Member’, ‘People Column’, ‘Subscribers’, ‘Team’, and ‘Guest’, can we add ‘Job Title’? That way if we want to notify an Director when something happens and there is a new director the automation will automatically update the new director based on the job title instead of having to change the ‘Team member’ or ‘Subscriber’.
